case_title: PAGUIO, EUGENIA VS BANTA, PATRICK JOHN DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENAED RECORDS FROM BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIRS, FILED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $460.05 FILED BY PAGUIO, EUGENIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANTA, PATRICK JOHN DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE BANTA, SUSAN THERESE DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGUIO, EUGENIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANTA, PATRICK JOHN DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE BANTA, SUSAN THERESE DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE DEFT SUSAN THERESE BANTA DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE-NO SERVICE OF DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR,RECORDS MANAGEMENT/SUB
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANTA, PATRICK JOHN DBA ALL AMERICAN AUTOMOTIVE
DECLARATION FILED BY PLTF, REQUESTED THE SUBPOENA RECORDS TO BE RETURNED TO HER POSSESSION FOR HER OWN RECORDS.
